/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayer.dir/NewMusicPlayer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayer.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayer.dir/model/Song.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayer.dir/model/ShellSort.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayer.dir/model/QuickSort.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayer.dir/model/Playlist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayer.dir/model/Advertisement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayer.dir/model/MusicLibrary.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayer.dir/model/Channel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayer.dir/model/Model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayer.dir/controller/PlaylistRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayer.dir/controller/Controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayer.dir/adapters/qt/QtPlaybackPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayer.dir/adapters/qt/QtVolumePanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayer.dir/adapters/qt/QtToolbar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayer.dir/adapters/qt/QtViewFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewMusicPlayer.dir/adapters/qt/QtView.cpp.o -o NewMusicPlayer -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtMultimedia.framework/Versions/A/QtMultimedia /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
